source_text.text:
[PDF_PAGE 13 | score=7] When Prismal reached the age of five, sohei from a nearby monastery assassi- nated his parents, taking Prismal, his brother, and all the family's wealth with them. The men dropped Prismal in the Dunes of Death, an ocean of sand more than 2,000 miles across. The sohei left Prismal to die, as he refused to cooper- ate with them. The men took his broth- er and disappeared. After seven harsh months, during which Prismal barely survived, wander- ing priests happened upon the boy and escorted him to their monastery. At age 25, he became a monk, and to this day his arms bear the burns of his fellowship: a leopard on his right arm and an oriental dragon on his left. On Prismal's 30th birthday, the m
[PDF_PAGE 20 | score=6] Abacus Amulet Name EP Cost Book/Page Name EP Cost Book/Page Abacus This is a wooden frame, about eight by ten inches across, in which several heavy wires are tightly strung parallel to one another. On each wire are ten wooden balls. The balls on the wires can be manipulated to perform simple mathematical operations such as addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. Complex equations are not possible. Abacus, Calculation 1,200 12,000 DRAG073-39 Accelerator An accelerator is a fantastic weapon built exclusively by the spacefaring Arcane. The device consists of a beam with a cup at one end and a swivel that allows the operator to rotate the beam. Objects placed into the cup are magica
[PDF_PAGE 17 | score=3] DMGR3 2123 Arms and Equipment Guide DMGR4 2128 Monster Mythology DQ1 9221 Shattered Statue DRAGxxx DRAGON® Magazine tax DS1 2401 Freedom DSQ1 2406 Road to Urik DSQ2 2410 Arcane Shadows DSQ3 2412 Asticlian Gambit DSR1 2404 Slave Tribes DSR2 2407 Dune Raider DSR3 2411 Veiled Alliance DSR4 2413 Valley of Dust and Fire DUNGxxx DUNGEON® Magazine #xxx EX1 9072 Dungeonland EX2 9073 Land Beyond the Magic Mirror FA1 9301 Halls of the High King FA2 9341 Nightmare Keep FMA1 9333 Fires of Zatal FMA2 9340 Endless Armies FMQ1 9349 City of Gold FOR1 9297 Draconomicon FOR2 9326 Drow of the Underdark FOR3 9346 Pirates of the Fallen Stars FR02 9217 Moonshae FR03 9224 Empires of the Sands FR04 9229 Magister FR
[PDF_PAGE 28 | score=3] Balance Balm Name EP Cost Book/Page Name EP Cost Book/Page Balance A balance is an instrument used to determine weight. The non-magical version uses a beam and counterweights to determine the exact weight of goods. Magical versions, however, are often used to create a balance, to establish an impartial verdict, or to create an even trade of one sort or another. Balance, Conversion Balance, Judgment Balance, Power 5,000 50,000 1,000 5,000 6,000 30,000 AC04-011 AC04-011 AC04-012 Ball Balls are spherical (or at least roughly spherical) objects, constructed from a multitude of elements; from leather to rock, from sculpted wood to crystal. Balls are commonly used to divine answers beyond the user
[PDF_PAGE 14 | score=2] Mortimer is the owner and manager of Chemcheaux 223. Mortimer's, large frame makes him appear slow, but he is very dexterous, and his incredible strength makes him a foe to be respected. With occasional assistance from Rhodhan, Mortimer keeps the increas- ing demands of the business at bay. Born in Calimport, Toril, Mortimer was once looked down upon by the na- tive Ravens Bluff people. Since he pur- chased the Chemcheaux franchise from Prismal and Rhodhan, however, his social status has taken a turn for the better. He is now invited to the large balls and elite social gatherings attend- ed by only the very rich, or the very powerful. Mortimer relishes the lime- light. Chemcheaux 223 was onc
[PDF_PAGE 22 | score=2] Armchair Name EP Cost Book/Page Name EP Cost Book/Page Anvil An anvil is a heavy iron block, that has a flat top and a round, horn-shaped end. Blacksmiths heat metals until they soften, and use the anvil's surface to hammer the metal into the desired shape. Magical anvils, however, can be of any size, shape or weight, and they are commonly used to perform functions other than those performed by their nonmagical counterparts. Anvil, Dwarves, High Anvil, Lortmil Mountains Anvil, Sympathetic Heat 5,000 50,000 DRAG058-27 3,000 30,000 2023-077 6,000 30,000 DRAG073-37 Apparatus Apparatus is a fancy term for a magical invention. Often, the apparatus is used to perform one, often intricate, operatio
[PDF_PAGE 23 | score=2] Armchair Armor Name Armchair, Relaxing Armchair, Retrieval Armchair, Seeing Armchair, Travel Armchair, Ugliness Armet, Wayland Armor, Absorption Armor, Acidic Secretion Armor, Anything Armor, Arcane AC 3 Armor, Banded +1 Armor, Banded +2 Armor, Banded +3 Armor, Banded +4 Armor, Banded +5 Armor, Blackflame Armor, Blending Armor, Bronze +1 Armor, Bronze +2 Armor, Bronze +3 Armor, Bronze +4 Armor, Bronze +5 Armor, Buoyancy Armor, Chain +1 Armor, Chain +2 Armor, Chain +3 Armor, Chain +4 Armor, Chain +5 Armor, Chain, Blue of Crystalmist Mountains +3 Armor, Chain, Drow +1 Armor, Chain, Drow +2 Name Armor, Chain, Drow +3 Armor, Chain, Drow +4 Armor, Chain, Drow +5 Armor, Chain, Elfin +1 Armor, Chai
[PDF_PAGE 52 | score=2] Dagger Deck Name Dagger, Healing Dagger, Hiding Dagger, Holding Dagger, Hornblade +1 Dagger, Hornblade +2 Dagger, Hornblade + 3 Dagger, Illusory Metal Dagger, Impaling +1 Dagger, Impaling + 2 Dagger, Impaling +3 Dagger, Invisible Dagger, Jump s; Dagger, Koalinth +1/ + 3 Dagger, Larger than Man-Sized +1 Dagger, Lighting Dagger, Longtooth +2 Dagger, Magius +3 Dagger, Mervic's +2 Dagger, Quickness +2 Dagger, Quickness + 3 Dagger, Quickness +4 Dagger, Random-Target +2 Dagger, Resource +2 Dagger, Resource + 3 Dagger, Resource +4 Dagger, Returning, Throwing Dagger, Rust +1 Dagger, Set, of +2 Dagger, Silencing Dagger, Slicing Dagger, Slowing Dagger, Smaller than Man-Sized +1/ + 2 Dagger, Sounding +
